$description: Component-level tokens. Layer 3 of 3. References semantic.json. Each component declares its variants and inherits surface foreground at render time.

cta-pill.$description: Outlined pill button. Two variants: swipe-arrow (multi-slide nav) and tap-target (e.g. service A | service B). See brand/00-foundations.md.

swipe-arrow.$description: Bottom-right of multi-slide carousels. Signals 'swipe.' Present on every slide including the last.

tap-target.$description: Wider variant for cover slides where two service offerings need to be surfaced. Bottom-center on announcement covers.

wordmark-block.$description: The two-part SERRANO CLÍNICA mark, set on a single baseline. Stacked variant exists only for narrow physical surfaces (towels) — never on digital. See brand/03-logo.md.

horizontal.$description: Default. SERRANO CLÍNICA on a single line.

stacked.$description: SERRANO over CLÍNICA. Reserved for physical textiles. Never digital.

headline-block.$description: The combined headline + body copy block on typographic slides. See brand/02-typography.md.

bullet-list.$description: Plain bullet markers, used in announcement body slides. Three items canonical, keep tight.
